content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed three changes: (1) fence-aware markdown parsing in compact_planned_elsewhere_summary that correctly skips fenced code blocks when extracting summary lines, (2) a membership_confirmed guard that prevents unconfirmed title-only matches from being used as location hints in build_planned_elsewhere_context, and (3) a proposal_id == bead.id guard that prevents a bead from appearing in its own planned-elsewhere context. All three are correctness fixes with proper test coverage. The fence parser handles CommonMark opening/closing rules correctly including info strings, mismatched markers, and unclosed fences. Byte indexing in closes_fence is safe because fence markers are single-byte ASCII. No bugs, safety issues, or significant maintainability concerns found.

## Amendments

None.
